description: The ProtofluxArrowManager component is used to drive and create the visuals for arrows pointing from/to variables and where they are being used.

fields.ConnectNode: The node the arrow should point to.
fields.TargetSize: The size field of the target.
fields.TargetOffset: The offset field of the target.
fields._arrowMesh: The arrow mesh this is modifying.
fields._targetVector: The field for the target vector on the arrow mesh.

usage: Not usually used by the user.
